Module com.example.battleship
Package com.example.battleship.controller

Class CombatController.MachineBoardListener

java.lang.Object
com.example.battleship.controller.event.BoardListenerAdapter
com.example.battleship.controller.CombatController.MachineBoardListener
All Implemented Interfaces:

Enclosing class:
CombatController
private class CombatController.MachineBoardListener extends BoardListenerAdapter
Shots landing on the machine's board -- fired by the human player.

  • Method Details

    • onShotResolved

      public void onShotResolved(Position position, ShotResult result, Ship ship)
      Description copied from interface: BoardListener
      Called right after a shot has been resolved.
      Specified by:
      onShotResolved in interface BoardListener
      Overrides:
      onShotResolved in class BoardListenerAdapter
      Parameters:
      position - the cell that was shot at
      result - the outcome of the shot
      ship - the ship that was hit, or null if the result was ShotResult.WATER
